untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detecting visual line patterns (rising price highs line + falling MACD peaks line) which cannot be directly expressed with single-bar comparison operators. The indicator set lacks a 'line_slope' or 'divergence_detector' function. A bearish divergence requires multi-bar historical analysis to confirm both lines' directions, which exceeds point-in-time indicator capabilities.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using basic directional conditions: price higher (high > prev_high) combined with MACD lower (macd < prev_close) and price confirming downside (close < prev_close). This is a simplified approximation. For production use, implement a custom divergence detection function that analyzes the last N bars to confirm uptrending highs and downtrending MACD peaks. Exit condition reverses entry logic (close above prior high).
